description: Protocol streams, exchanges, handshake, hive, pingpong, and identify details

targets.expr: sum by (protocol, direction) (rate(vertex_protocol_exchange_duration_seconds_sum{instance=~"$instance"}[$rate_window])) / clamp_min(sum by (protocol, direction) (rate(vertex_protocol_exchange_duration_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance"}[$rate_window])), 1)

panels.title: Exchange Duration p50 / p99 by Protocol

targets.expr: sum by (stage) (rate(vertex_handshake_stage_duration_seconds_sum{purpose="topology", instance=~"$instance"}[$rate_window])) / clamp_min(sum by (stage) (rate(vertex_handshake_stage_duration_seconds_count{purpose="topology", instance=~"$instance"}[$rate_window])), 1)
